creator: ea@uoga.net
text:
(In reply to Dries Michiels from comment #4)
Yes, the same error on host too.

Also just to be clear, this is about influxdb v1.4.2 that lives in FreeBSD 11.1 jail, installed some years ago that exposes this behavior. The latest version that is in ports, v1.8.10, it runs fine, I just tested it.
